entry.title: New: RES24-207 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
APPROVING A GRANT OF EASEMENT TO HAWAIIAN ELECTRIC COMPANY, INC. FOR ELECTRICAL PURPOSES SERVING THE HONOLULU RAIL TRANSIT PROJECT ("HRTP") OVER, UNDER, THROUGH, AND ACROSS A PORTION OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 533 KAAAHI STREET, HONOLULU, HAWAII 96817 (TAX MAP KEY ("TMK"): (1) 1-5-007:023).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
